name: docs-vs-config-port-drift
prompt: Run context-gc on this repo. README.md says the API runs on port 8000, but docker-compose.yml maps the service to 8080. Diagnose the drift and propose a fix, but do not edit yet.

files.README.md:
# Service

Start the API at http://localhost:8000.

expected_output: Phase 1 MARK only; no edits before confirmation
Flags a contradiction or stale claim with severity 🔴 or 🟠
Identifies docker-compose.yml as the likely root for the live port
Proposes reconciling README.md to port 8080
Mentions adding/updating SOURCES.md as the write barrier

name: local-prod-config-version-drift
prompt: Our local config.yaml has _config_version: 27 while the server migrated config has _config_version: 29. Treat this as context/config drift and produce a sweep plan.
expected_output: Treats this as configuration drift, not just documentation cleanup
Asks or states why the migrated server snapshot is the authority/root
Produces a sweep plan gated by confirmation
Does not directly overwrite config.yaml without approval
Records the root-to-copy relationship in SOURCES.md

name: agent-context-rot-dead-skill
prompt: GC this agent context. SOUL.md still tells the agent to use a deleted skill called old-scraper, while skills/new-scraper/SKILL.md exists. There are also three overlapping rules about scraping limits.

files.SOUL.md:
Use old-scraper for all collection.
Limit scraping to 10 req/s.
Never exceed 5 req/s.
Scraping should be conservative.

expected_output: Recognizes this as agent context rot
Flags old-scraper as an orphan/dead reference
Flags overlapping scraping rules as duplication or contradiction
Proposes compacting to one authoritative scraping policy
Requires user confirmation before editing SOUL.md

name: knowledge-base-duplication-compaction
prompt: Our knowledge base has the same deployment instructions copied in README.md, docs/deploy.md, and wiki/export.md. They currently agree, but I want to prevent future drift. Run context-gc.

files.README.md: Deploy: run ./deploy.sh and then restart service.
files.docs/deploy.md: Deploy: run ./deploy.sh and then restart service.
files.wiki/export.md: Deploy: run ./deploy.sh and then restart service.

expected_output: Flags duplication as 🟡 drift factory even when copies currently agree
Chooses or asks for a canonical root
Proposes replacing duplicates with pointers, not rewriting all copies forever
Updates SOURCES.md as the write barrier
Explains why duplication creates future contradictions
